prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document primarily addresses phosphorus reduction targets and wastewater treatment initiatives under the Environment Act, which applies specifically to England. It does not include provisions or implications for Scotland, which has its own environmental regulations and policies.
